steps.reasoning: To find the song with the highest total revenue, I first aggregate revenue by track_id in the sales DuckDB table, then look up the track metadata in SQLite to identify the song title. I need to get top track_ids by revenue, then perform entity resolution to group duplicate track records representing the same real-world song.

steps.query_used:
SELECT track_id, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue
FROM sales
GROUP BY track_id
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 20
